title: ATP Consumer Order Verification and Dispute Flow
interaction_flow: [if !hello || !hello.ok] consumerAgent → Caller: throw Error('Failed to register with Hub')
hubClient → Hub (HTTP): POST /a2a/atp/dispute  body={sender_id, order_id, reason}
hubClient → consumerAgent: {ok: true, data} | {ok: false, error}

consumerAgent.ensureInitialized: async () => void — checks _initialized flag; calls sendHelloToHub(); throws on failure; sets _initialized=true
consumerAgent.dispute: async (orderId: string, reason: string) => {ok, data?, error?} — calls ensureInitialized then disputeOrder
consumerAgent.confirmDelivery: async (orderId: string) => {ok, data?, error?} — calls verifyDelivery(orderId, 'confirm')
consumerAgent.requestAiJudge: async (orderId: string) => {ok, data?, error?} — calls verifyDelivery(orderId, 'ai_judge')
consumerAgent.checkOrder: async (orderId: string) => {ok, data?, error?} — calls getOrderStatus(orderId) directly (no ensureInitialized)

hubClient._hubPost: function (pathSuffix, body, timeoutMs?) — fetch POST to hubUrl+pathSuffix with buildHubHeaders(); returns {ok,data} or {ok:false,error}
hubClient._hubGet: function (pathSuffix, timeoutMs?) — fetch GET to hubUrl+pathSuffix; returns {ok,data} or {ok:false,error}

key_relationships: consumerAgent imports_from hubClient: disputeOrder, verifyDelivery, settleOrder, placeOrder, getOrderStatus, getAtpPolicy
hubClient imports_from a2aProtocol: getHubUrl, buildHubHeaders, getNodeId
conditions_and_branching: ensureInitialized: skip if _initialized=true; throw if sendHelloToHub returns falsy or !hello.ok
dispute: ensureInitialized must succeed before disputeOrder is called
_hubPost: if !hubUrl return {ok:false,error:'no_hub_url'}; if HTTP !ok return {ok:false,status,error}; on network error catch returns {ok:false,error}
disputeOrder reason must be ≥10 chars (enforced server-side)

endpoints_called.POST /a2a/atp/order: body: {sender_id, capabilities, budget, routing_mode, verify_mode, question, signals, min_reputation}

important_notes: Module-level _initialized flag (not class-based). ensureInitialized is called at the start of dispute/confirmDelivery/requestAiJudge/settle/orderService — NOT by checkOrder/getPolicy. hubClient is a plain function module (no class). _hubPost/_hubGet are internal helpers not exported.
